---
name: Good first issue
about: Create a beginner-friendly task for new contributors
title: "[Good First Issue]: "
labels: good first issue, help wanted
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the problem clearly.

Example:

A part of the app still uses old Bluesky wording, links, branding, or behavior that should be changed for CoSeeker.

## Desired outcome

Describe what should be true after this issue is completed.

Example:

The affected screen, flow, or text should clearly use CoSeeker language and should not confuse users.

## Relevant files or areas

List likely files, folders, screens, or search terms.

Examples:

- Search for:
  - `Bluesky`
  - `bsky`
  - `bsky.app`
- Check onboarding screens
- Check settings screens
- Check profile screens

## Acceptance criteria

This issue is complete when:

- [ ] The problem described above is fixed
- [ ] The change is small and focused
- [ ] No unrelated files are changed
- [ ] User-facing text is clear
- [ ] Screenshots are added to the pull request if the change affects UI

## Skills needed

Select what applies:

- [ ] Beginner-friendly
- [ ] React Native
- [ ] TypeScript
- [ ] UI / copy update
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Testing
- [ ] Other

## Notes for contributors

If you want to work on this issue, comment:

`I would like to work on this.`

A maintainer will confirm before you begin.
